FreeAgent:

DDJ Silverlight Tutorial

Posted on 20 August 2007 by Johannes Fahrenkrug. Tags: Programming Silverlight
I just got a newsletter from DDJ about a Silverlight demo application and tutorial they've put together. When it comes to Microsoft they don't seem too objective to me at all times but I do think that Silverlight is pretty cool so I don't really care this time. What they did is put together an Arkanoid clone using Silverlight and they tell you step by step how they did it. They also linked to the Microsoft Silverlight Developer Reference (a big, insightful, and pretty picture). I haven't worked through the tutorial yet, but I'll make sure to check it out as soon as I have time.
